# Pearlie — Dental Clinic Matching Platform

> Pearlie is an independent dental clinic matching platform that helps patients in the UK find the right dental clinic for their needs — quickly, transparently, and without pressure. Founded in London by Dr Grei Muskaj, BDS, PGCert.

## What Pearlie Does

Pearlie matches patients with trusted, GDC-registered dental clinics based on treatment needs, location, budget, and personal preferences. The service is free for patients. Clinics do not pay to appear higher in results — matching is based on relevance and fit, not advertising spend.

## Key Facts

- Free for patients — no sign-up fees, subscription charges, or hidden costs
- Independent — does not own or operate dental clinics
- All listed clinics are independently verified and confirmed as registered with the General Dental Council (GDC)
- Covers private dental treatments including Invisalign, dental implants, veneers, teeth whitening, composite bonding, and general dentistry
- Primarily serves patients in London and across the UK
- Founded in London by Dr Grei Muskaj, BDS, PGCert
- Backed by the Pearlie Guarantee — if your experience doesn't meet expectations, Pearlie covers your next consultation fee

## Pearlie in Numbers

- 20+ verified private clinics across London
- 20+ London boroughs covered
- 50+ registered dental professionals
- 10+ treatment categories available
- Expanding toward 500+ clinics across the UK

## How It Works

1. Patient completes a short intake form describing treatment needs, location, and preferences
2. Pearlie matches the patient with suitable dental clinics from its verified network
3. Patient reviews clinic profiles, compares options side by side, and contacts clinics directly
4. Patient can chat with clinics, ask questions, and book only when ready — no obligation

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is Pearlie free to use?
Pearlie is completely free for patients — there are no sign-up fees, subscription charges, or hidden costs. You are under no obligation to book or proceed with any clinic you are matched with.

### How are clinics selected?
Clinics are selected based on location, services offered, availability, and suitability for patient preferences. Every clinic is verified as registered with the General Dental Council (GDC). Pearlie focuses on quality over quantity — not all clinics in an area are listed.

### Does Pearlie provide dental advice?
Pearlie does not provide dental or medical advice. All diagnosis, treatment planning, and clinical care are provided by independent dental clinics.

### How does Pearlie make money?
Pearlie may receive a fee from clinics when a patient books following an introduction. Clinic fees do not influence which clinics are recommended — matching is based on relevance and fit.

### Is Pearlie part of the NHS?
Pearlie is an independent, private service and is not affiliated with the NHS. Clinics listed on Pearlie are private dental practices.

### Do clinics pay to appear higher?
Clinic visibility is based on match relevance and profile completeness — not paid ranking.

### What happens to my data?
Patient data is used only for the matching service and handled under UK GDPR. Clinics only see details when the patient chooses to contact them. Data deletion can be requested at any time.

### How much does Invisalign cost in London?
Invisalign in London starts from around £2,500 depending on the complexity of your case and the clinic you choose. Pearlie helps you compare Invisalign providers across London so you can see indicative pricing, read reviews, and message clinics directly before committing.

### How do I find a good dentist for dental implants?
Finding the right dentist for dental implants means looking for a GDC-registered clinician with implant-specific experience, transparent pricing, and strong patient reviews. Pearlie matches you with verified implant providers in London based on your needs, budget, and location.

### What should I look for when choosing a cosmetic dentist?
When choosing a cosmetic dentist, look for GDC registration, before-and-after photos of previous work, transparent pricing, and patient reviews. Pearlie helps you find verified cosmetic dentists across London who specialise in treatments like veneers, composite bonding, and teeth whitening.

## The Pearlie Guarantee

Every clinic on Pearlie is verified for quality care, transparent pricing, and GDC registration. If a patient's experience with a Pearlie-matched clinic doesn't meet expectations, Pearlie covers the cost of the next consultation or check-up at another clinic. The guarantee is included at no extra cost for every patient who books through Pearlie.

## About the Founder

> "Private dentistry should be transparent, accessible, and centred around patient confidence. Pearlie was created to bridge the gap between high-quality clinicians and patients who value clarity and trust."
> — Dr Grei Muskaj BDS, PGCert

Pearlie was founded by Dr Grei Muskaj, BDS, PGCert — a dentist who recognised that patients often struggle to find the right clinic among too many options, mixed opinions, and unclear pricing. Pearlie was built to bring clarity and confidence to that decision.

## The Dental Access Crisis in the UK

- 13 million adults in England have unmet dental needs (Source: BDA, 2024)
- 5.6 million tried but failed to get an NHS dental appointment (Source: BDA, 2024)
- 69% of those unable to access NHS care paid privately (Source: Ipsos, 2024)
- 26% resorted to unsafe self-treatment (Source: Ipsos, 2024)
- 1 in 10 adults reported dental pain from untreated problems (Source: GOV.UK Adult Oral Health Survey, 2021)

Pearlie was created in response to this growing access gap — helping patients navigate private dental care with transparency, clarity, and confidence.

## Treatment Pages

Pearlie publishes detailed, clinically reviewed treatment guides to help patients compare options, understand costs, and find verified providers in London.

### Invisalign
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/invisalign
- Typical cost in London: £2,500 to £5,500
- Covers: How Invisalign works, Lite vs Comprehensive, cost breakdown, finance options, suitability, Invisalign vs braces, choosing a provider, treatment timeline, aftercare
- Includes verified London clinics offering Invisalign with pricing and reviews

### Dental Implants
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/dental-implants
- Typical cost in London: £2,000 to £6,000 per implant
- Covers: Types of implants (single, bridge, All-on-4), procedure steps, cost breakdown, NHS availability, recovery timeline, success rates, candidacy, risks, alternatives
- Includes verified London clinics offering dental implants with pricing and reviews

### Teeth Whitening
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/teeth-whitening
- Typical cost in London: £250 to £1,000
- Covers: Professional whitening types (in-office, home kits, Boutique, Enlighten), cost comparison, how it works, expected results, sensitivity, professional vs over-the-counter
- Includes verified London clinics offering teeth whitening with pricing and reviews

### Composite Bonding
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/composite-bonding
- Typical cost in London: £150 to £400 per tooth
- Covers: What composite bonding is, procedure, cost breakdown, longevity, composite bonding vs veneers, suitability, choosing a provider, aftercare
- Includes verified London clinics offering composite bonding with pricing and reviews

### Veneers
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/veneers
- Typical cost in London: £400 to £1,200 per tooth
- Covers: Porcelain vs composite veneers, procedure steps, cost breakdown, longevity, suitability, choosing a provider, aftercare, veneers vs bonding
- Includes verified London clinics offering veneers with pricing and reviews

### Emergency Dental Care
- URL: https://pearlie.org/treatments/emergency-dental
- Typical cost in London: £50 to £700
- Covers: What counts as a dental emergency, first aid guidance, types (toothache, broken tooth, abscess, knocked-out tooth), cost breakdown, NHS 111 guidance, what to expect, follow-up care, prevention
- Includes verified London clinics offering same-day emergency appointments

## Find a Dentist in London

Pearlie helps patients find dentists across all areas of London. Each location page lists verified, GDC-registered clinics with ratings, pricing, and direct messaging.

### Location Directory
- URL: https://pearlie.org/find
- Browse dentists by London region: Central, South, North, West, and East London

### Dentist Near Me
- URL: https://pearlie.org/find/dentist-near-me
- Enter your postcode to find nearby verified dental clinics
- Matches based on treatment needs, not just distance

### Central London
- Harley Street: https://pearlie.org/find/harley-street — London's premier medical district with specialist and cosmetic dentists
- Soho: https://pearlie.org/find/soho — Central London clinics near Oxford Street and Piccadilly Circus
- Mayfair: https://pearlie.org/find/mayfair — Premium dental care in London's most exclusive neighbourhood

### South London
- Clapham: https://pearlie.org/find/clapham — Popular clinics serving Clapham, Battersea, and Brixton
- Brixton: https://pearlie.org/find/brixton — Affordable and accessible dental care in South London
- Peckham: https://pearlie.org/find/peckham — Growing dental scene in the heart of Southwark

### North London
- Islington: https://pearlie.org/find/islington — Quality dental practices near Angel and Highbury
- Camden: https://pearlie.org/find/camden — Dental clinics in Camden Town and Kentish Town
- Hampstead: https://pearlie.org/find/hampstead — Premium dental care in leafy North London

### West London
- Kensington & Chelsea: https://pearlie.org/find/kensington-chelsea — High-end dental clinics in West London
- Notting Hill: https://pearlie.org/find/notting-hill — Boutique dental practices near Portobello Road
- Hammersmith: https://pearlie.org/find/hammersmith — Convenient dental care in West London

### East London
- Canary Wharf: https://pearlie.org/find/canary-wharf — Modern dental clinics for city professionals
- Shoreditch: https://pearlie.org/find/shoreditch — Contemporary dental practices in East London's creative hub
- Stratford: https://pearlie.org/find/stratford — Accessible dental care near Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park

### Quick Facts: Dentists in London
- London has over 4,500 registered dental practices (Source: GDC Register)
- The average private dental check-up in London costs £60–£150
- Over 70% of London dental patients choose private care due to NHS waiting times
- Pearlie lists 20+ verified private clinics across 15 London neighbourhoods
- All clinics on Pearlie are independently verified against the GDC register
